title: In /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config, verify test coverage/evidence for the Phase 0 handoff pipeline change. Compare against the 7-item test plan and acceptance criteria in ~/.claude/cache/handoff-phase0-codex.md and ~/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md. Return missing test...
summary_text: **Findings** 1. `record-provider` is unauthenticated and directly increments quorum counters; any caller can spoof success for any provider/run via one command ([kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:220](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:220), [kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:257](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:257)). 2. Health trusts only aggregated `provider_usage.*.success_count` (no provenance/source validation), so spoofed writes can produce `healthy` ([kernel-runtime-health.sh:188](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh:188), [kernel-runtime-health.sh:233](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh:233), [kernel-runtime-health.sh:253](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh:253)). 3. Consensus `record-from-runtime` uses the same untrusted counters, so spoofed writes can approve runtime-backed consensus ([kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:92](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:92), [kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:305](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:305), [kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:323](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:323)). 4. Launch preflight is now real execution for GLM/specialists, but trust still lands on the same spoofable ledger path: quorum runs lanes, and those scripts write `record-provider` directly ([codex-kernel-guard.sh:608](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:608), [kernel-launch-quorum.sh:93](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-launch-quorum.sh:93), [kernel-launch-quorum.sh:103](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-launch-quorum.sh:103)). 5. Specialist readiness has env short-circuits (`KERNEL_CURSOR_READY`, `KERNEL_COPILOT_READY`) which are useful for tests but weaken production trust if used as real readiness signals ([kernel-specialist-picker.sh:107](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh:107), [kernel-specialist-picker.sh:152](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh:152)). **Minimal hardening changes** 1. Add provenance-bearing provider events in ledger (append-only), e.g. `provider_events[]` with `provider/result/source/actor/trace_id/envelope_path/at`, and derive `trusted_success_count` from these; keep current `record-provider` as `source=manual` and untrusted by default ([kernel-runtime-ledger.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh)). 2. In launch path, mint per-launch attestation nonce and pass it through preflight command env; ledger marks events trusted only when nonce + run_id + actor match expected launch context ([codex-kernel-guard.sh:608](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:608), [kernel-launch-quorum.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-launch-quorum.sh)). 3. Switch health and consensus checks from `success_count` to `trusted_success_count` only ([kernel-runtime-health.sh:188](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh:188), [kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:92](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:92)). 4. Gate env readiness overrides behind explicit test-mode flag (e.g. `KERNEL_TEST_MODE=true`) so production runtime cannot bypass provider readiness via env alone ([kernel-specialist-picker.sh:107](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh:107)). **Adversarial test suggestions** 1.
